judge_calls.reasoning: The assistant effectively grouped the 13 transactions into clean business expenses (8 items) and issues (5 items), which aligns with the correct high-level categories (Travel, Dining, Office Supplies, Cloud Services for the clean ones; the issues are correctly identified as duplicate, refund, or IT equipment needing review). While category labels are not explicitly stated, the treatment and descriptions accurately reflect the nature of each transaction. The only minor point is the swapped description of flight vs hotel (txn_006/007), but both correctly fall under Travel, so no actual categorization error. Overall, nearly all transactions are correctly categorized in a reasonable system.
